article.title: Uber | L4 SDE | Brazil
article.content:
I’ve been preparing intensively for the Uber SDE L4 (Brazil) interviews. For the past few weeks, I’ve been grinding LeetCode every day, especially focusing on the most frequently asked questions from the last 6 months and giving extra attention to the newer ones.

Still, even with all this practice, I don’t feel fully confident about scheduling my next interview attempt.

I’d really appreciate if someone who has gone through the process (or is familiar with it) could share:

-Which type of problems I should prioritize (graphs, DP, system design, etc.)
-Whether Uber tends to lean on more classic patterns or newer/less common ones
-Any additional resources beyond LeetCode that helped you prepare

Thanks in advance for any advice — I’m trying to study smart, not just hard. 🙏

post.content: They came to my college (India) for a data science internship role, all 3 questions in the online assessment round were graph related, so heavy focus on graphs
Based on me and my friends experiences in DSA round :   uber(India)  mainly focused on Graph and DP problems that too medium-hard level.
